on the Rig.

Pick Your Path

🪜

New to the Industry

No experience needed. Learn the roles, the hierarchy, and exactly what it takes to land your first job as a roustabout.

How to Become a Roughneck →
🧮

Working Rig Hand

Run real hydrostatic pressure, mud weight, and kill sheet calculations. Formulas explained the way a driller would explain them.

Open Calculators →
🎓

Engineer or Supervisor

Deep technical reference on pore pressure prediction, ECD, casing design, and well control theory.

Well Control Reference →
🔥

Welder / Trades

© 2026 RigFloorHQ. Educational and reference content only. Always follow your company's approved procedures, regulatory requirements, and the instructions of your certified well control supervisor. Well control decisions must never be made solely from reference materials.
